name: Fried Onions and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, sauté onions in butter until tender.
2. Place apples on top of the onions.
3. Combine remaining ingredients; sprinkle over the apples.
4. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Uncover and simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until apples are tender.
6. Serve with a slotted spoon.
